tipRules.tip: KVD: 'Jerkbaits really shine in clear water reservoirs because they attract bass visually. Very few lures outperform a jerkbait in late winter/early spring. Standard 300 series around docks and under 10ft; 300D for 15-25ft depths. On herring lakes, bass are nomadic — need to stay on the move with power baits.'

KVD: 'The 3XD's small body gets bites that bigger-bodied crankbaits won't. Dives 10-12ft — a key depth zone in late winter/early spring. When things get tough, switch to a Baby Z-Too on a shaky head, swimbait jig head, or drop shot for finesse versatility.'
